languages.text: Уцелевший при бомбардировке командный штаб — веский довод в пользу обороны.

languages.text: The command headquarters surviving the bombardment is a strong argument in favour of defence.

traits.locale_text: The command headquarters surviving the bombardment is a strong argument in favour of defence.

languages.text: Das Hauptquartier hat das Bombardement überstanden und ist ein starkes Argument für die Verteidigung.
languages.original_text: The command headquarters surviving the bombardment is a strong argument in favour of defence.

traits.locale_text: Das Hauptquartier hat das Bombardement überstanden und ist ein starkes Argument für die Verteidigung.

languages.text: Le quartier général de commandement, qui a survécu au bombardement, est un argument de poids en faveur de la défense.
languages.original_text: The command headquarters surviving the bombardment is a strong argument in favour of defence.

traits.locale_text: Le quartier général de commandement, qui a survécu au bombardement, est un argument de poids en faveur de la défense.

languages.text: 指挥总部在轰炸中幸存了下来，这是主张防守的有力论据。
languages.original_text: The command headquarters surviving the bombardment is a strong argument in favour of defence.

traits.locale_text: 指挥总部在轰炸中幸存了下来，这是主张防守的有力论据。

languages.text: El hecho de que el centro de mando siga en pie tras el bombardeo favorece la idea de seguir a la defensiva.
languages.original_text: The command headquarters surviving the bombardment is a strong argument in favour of defence.

traits.locale_text: El hecho de que el centro de mando siga en pie tras el bombardeo favorece la idea de seguir a la defensiva.

languages.text: Komuta karargâhının bombardımanı sağlam atlatması, savunma lehine güçlü bir argüman.
languages.original_text: The command headquarters surviving the bombardment is a strong argument in favour of defence.

traits.locale_text: Komuta karargâhının bombardımanı sağlam atlatması, savunma lehine güçlü bir argüman.

languages.text: 砲撃を生き延びた司令部があることは、防衛の強固な根拠である。
